title: Talent Acquisition Specialist (IT)
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a proactive and driven Talent Acquisition Specialist (IT) to support our internal hiring needs, with a strong focus on sourcing and headhunting IT professionals. This role plays a critical part in building a strong pipeline of technical talent to support the company’s business growth.

Key Responsibilities

  • Proactively source, screen, and engage IT candidates across various roles (e.g. project managers, business analysts, UIUX designers, software engineers, architects, data, cloud, cybersecurity, etc.)

  • Conduct active headhunting via LinkedIn, job portals, professional networks, and referrals

  • Manage the end-to-end recruitment lifecycle: sourcing, screening, interviews, offers, and onboarding coordination

  • Partner closely with hiring managers to understand role requirements and hiring priorities

  • Develop and maintain a strong talent pipeline for current and future IT hiring needs

  • Conduct initial candidate interviews and assess technical role fit

  • Coordinate interviews and follow up with candidates and stakeholders

  • Maintain accurate recruitment data and reports in the ATS or internal trackers

  • Support employer branding initiatives and recruitment campaigns when required

  • Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the hiring process

Requirements

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field

  • 2–5 years of experience in talent acquisition or recruitment, with a strong focus on IT hiring

  • Prior headhunting or agency recruitment experience is highly preferred

  • Good understanding of IT roles, technologies, and skillsets

  • Strong sourcing skills (LinkedIn Recruiter, job boards, networking, referrals)

  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills

  • Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work in a fast-paced environment

  • Ability to manage multiple hiring requirements simultaneously

Nice to Have

  • Experience hiring for tech consulting, system integrators, or government / enterprise IT projects

  • Exposure to both permanent and contract staffing

  • Familiarity with HR systems or ATS platforms

What We Offer

  • Opportunity to build and shape internal IT talent capabilities

  • Collaborative and supportive team environment

  • Exposure to diverse and meaningful IT roles

  • Career growth and development opportunities

postedCompany.description: Neutron Pte. Ltd. is a software consultancy firm at the forefront of digital transformation. Our strength lies in user-centric product design and data-driven analysis, harmonized with a commitment to cybersecurity. Leveraging innovative technologies, we offer customized solutions that propel growth and efficiency. Neutron Pte. Ltd. - your trusted partner in navigating the digital landscape.
